features: Pack of 3 Apple Cinnamon Scented Candle Glass Pot Jar Aromatherapy Fragrance-PAN AROMA- Festive Christmas Candles

Candles come in Clear Jar. treat yourself or buy it as a gift. It comes in its own container which makes the candle convenient and simple to use and stops unwanted wax dripping onto surfaces. Only want to smell the candle when it's burning? No problem just re-place the lid, when you don't want the scent to fill the room. The glass container makes it ideal for use indoors or outdoors too.

Warm Apple & Cinnamon- fill your home with a beautiful lasting scent, and create a cosy, warm and relaxing environment on a cold winter's evening or maybe just a nice pleasant aroma on a summers evening after a hot exhausting day
Each Candle Burn up to 21 Hour - this long-lasting candle will provide your home with a scent throughout the house, depending on how often you light it of course!
description: Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave unattended. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Never burn a candle completely and dispose of properly.
